positive: A minimalist geometric forest scene. Stylized trees and foliage rendered in solid, contrasting blocks of teal, burnt orange, and deep navy. The composition features overlapping, clean silhouettes of stylized animals (deer, fox, owl) peeking through the geometric foliage. Use a strong, graphic art style reminiscent of mid-century modern design combined with nature illustration. High contrast, flat colors, crisp edges, perfect symmetry, isolated on a clean white background, suitable for screen printing on t-shirts, vector graphic style, highly detailed, wallpaper print quality.
